title: AES-CBC Playground
description: A lightweight client-side web tool for AES-256-CBC + SHA-256 key derivation.

title: TripleDES Encryptor/Decryptor
description: A simple browser-based tool for 3DES encryption/decryption.

title: GeoIP Browser
description: A dark-themed IP lookup tool powered by ipapi.co, returns full JSON geo data.

title: Phone Number Validator
description: A simple web tool to validate and format phone numbers by country. It checks number validity and instantly shows E.164, international, national, and RFC3966 formats.

title: Jitsi Virtual Background Test
description: A static GitHub Pages repro page for testing Jitsi External API virtual background behavior.
